name: Pepper Onion Beef
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Beef flank steak, sliced thin across the grain
recipeInstructions:
1 MARINADE
- 1 tablespoon Light soy sauce
- 1 tablespoon Dry sherry
- 1/2 teaspoon Freshly grated ginger
- Marinate the cut meat in the soy, wine and ginger. Mix well and let sit for 15 minutes.
2 ADDITIONAL FOR CHOWING
- 1 tablespoon Peanut oil
- 2 cloves Garlic, sliced thin
- 8 Green onions, cut Chinese style
- 1 packet MSG (optional)
- 1 teaspoon Sugar
- Freshly ground black pepper to taste - USE LOTS
3 Heat the wok or deep frying pan with peanut oil until it reaches 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Add the meat all at once and stir to separate. Remove after one minute and drain the meat in a colander.
4 Heat the wok again and add more peanut oil for chowing. Add the garlic and green onions and cook for just a moment.
5 Add the drained meat and all remaining ingredients, using plenty of black pepper. Cook until the meat is hot, then serve.
Note: Do not use words like "smash", "destroy", "burn", or "splutter". Use gentle stirring and cooking techniques to ensure food safety.
